test.details: 1450 tests pass across all test files. 0 failed. Includes 35 new tests for this milestone (8 opsz + 10 weight + 17 ctype/cross).

typecheck.details: Clean release build with no errors. Rust compilation IS typechecking.

lint.details: Compiler warnings are present in test files (unused imports in oom.rs, unicode.rs, ctype.rs; dead code in adversarial_slab.rs, scheduling_context.rs, handle_lifecycle.rs) but these are pre-existing and in test scaffolding, not in the production code being reviewed. No new warnings introduced by this milestone's features.

featureReviews.summary: Clean implementation of automatic optical sizing using typographic formula (px × 72 / dpi). Proper clamping, graceful no-op for non-opsz fonts. 8 tests cover all validation assertions.

Well-engineered weight correction with compile-time sRGB-to-linear LUT, WCAG-based luminance, continuous linear correction curve (max 15% reduction). Clean no-op for non-variable fonts. 10 tests thoroughly validate monotonicity and rendering impact.

Clean TypographyConfig struct mapping content types to font/feature/weight/tracking/opsz. Exhaustive ContentType matching. Research document comprehensively updated. 17 tests verify all typography defaults and end-to-end perceptual rendering.
